title: taraxacum microceras
intro: Taraxacum microceras, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is often used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. Taraxacum microceras can be prepared as herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine in various forms, including capsules and dried root extracts.
